items.title: How Solana’s rising network activity can drive SOL’s breakout above $82
items.whyYouShouldCare: Increased network activity on Solana could enhance SOL's market position, potentially leading to significant price movements above $82.

items.title: Nasdaq brings proprietary market data onchain through Pyth
items.whyYouShouldCare: The integration of Nasdaq's proprietary market data on Solana via Pyth could improve liquidity and attract institutional interest in the ecosystem.

items.title: Solana Company to back Kazakhstan’s $6B crypto megacity ambition
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's involvement in Kazakhstan's $6B crypto megacity project may bolster its ecosystem usage and expand its global influence in the crypto space.
